name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: BGA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$5.6300, stop A$5.2569, target A$6.2000 (1.53:1) — then trail it.
